title: Copper Appliances
description: Adds Copper Appliances for the Rotom Push datapack!
body:
## **This is a side mod for the [Rotom Push datapack](https://modrinth.com/datapack/rotom-push) for the Cobblemon mod!**
A mod made for the **[Rotom Push datapack](https://modrinth.com/datapack/rotom-push)**!
________________________________________________________________________________________________
## **Orange appliances for an orange mon!**
- This mod adds 6 new blocks to the game, all meant for Rotom to inspirit!
![Copper Appliances](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ce785bf5fda499afaae6eed4c41880091b865012.png)
- All 6 blocks are craftable, and their crafting recipes will be in the gallery of this mod
- Right click any of them with Rotom in your party, and it will gain the ability to transform!
* **These blocks can also naturaly generate in your world, when paired with the [Rotom-Tale worldgen datapack](https://modrinth.com/datapack/rotom-tale)(read more in the [datapack page](https://modrinth.com/datapack/rotom-tale))**
